subject: [Pre-read] ERP Project Meeting Update_October 2025
deck_filename: Swarm Project _ biz plan & PnL update.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian and Jianghong,

Please find the attached slides for our ERP meeting tomorrow.
Thank you.

-- 
*Nicholas Lim*
Shopee | Cross Border | Special Projects / TWCB

Hi all,

Sending the follow-ups from the meeting earlier. Thank you.

# Key Topics Action Items PIC ETA
1 P&L Reduce SLS Rate card for ERP to heavy rate card Faye Oct 28th
2 P&L Redefine Incubation vs Mature sellers, check and make sure mature
sellers positive P&L Shuning/Nic Oct 28th
3 P&L/Targets Optimize rebate spending in markets (i.e. PH/BR/TW etc) to
lower down costs dramatically and evaluate topline impact accordingly
Shuning/Nic Oct 28th
4 OF Recheck OF funding interest to cut the cost to Shopee Shuning/Nic Oct
30th

content.question:
Thanks



For #1 – It should not only be for ERP right?

accordingly.*

   - What is the definition of incubation vs mature?
- Does the P&L here right now include CNSIP?
- For Mature UE, can help me compare with existing CNSIP?

- Our UE improvement from Oct to Nov will come from
      - Rev increase of USD 3?
- For Incubation UE, can help me compare with existing SCS incubation?
- What is the UE before and after Oct cut?

And what was the impact to
   ADO?

   - Cannot reconcile the numbers here with Slide 2?

I thought we would
   breakeven by Jul’26?

Slide 5

   - Similar comment as Slide 4
   - What will before/after for Nov’25 submission look like?

OR Shop ado > threshold for each market
Big market: VN, PH, TH, MY >300

Small market: >20

Hi Ian and Jianghong,

Pls find the follow-up items of this meeting

# Key Topics Action Items PIC ETA
1 Spending Optimization 1. To cut OF spending and optimization ERP sellers
spending Shuning/Nic Oct 31
2 OF effectiveness evaluation 1. To run OF for another one month and
monitor topline and PnL performance
2. OF SKUs evaluation: whether truly bring in SKUs that are not on Shopee
3. OF SKUs price mark-up evaluation Shuning/Nic Nov 15
3 SLS discount evaluation 1. To confirm if to apply Choice SLS discount to
Swarm Faye/Edric Oct 31
4 Official PnL booking 1. To start booking from Nov'25 Submission
Faye/Waimei Nov 20

Best,

*Faye Yan*
